title: Overtown District
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Corint_map.jpg|thumb|Overtown District on a map]]
'''Overtown District''' was one of the areas of [[Corint City]], the planetary capital of [[Pirik]].

Overtown District was the seat of the planetary government and of its center, [[Strak Tower]].
